title: Point size slider in the 2D viewport panel
capture_instructions: Split-viewport layout. Show the Point Size slider at the top of the 2D panel. The slider should be set to a mid-range value (e.g., 3.0) so the handle position is clearly visible and not at an extreme. The 2D viewport should show points rendered at that size for visual comparison.
ui_state: Plan/Profile active, 2D panel with Point Size slider visible at a non-default value

annotations.label: Slider track — drag left to reduce, right to increase
2D viewport — points rendered at current size
